name: get-current-page-readme
description: Read README text directly from current GitHub repository page DOM

manifest.script: async () => { const container = document.querySelector('#readme article.markdown-body, #readme .markdown-body, article.markdown-body'); const readme = (container?.textContent || '').trim(); if (!readme) throw new Error('README content not found from page DOM'); return { readme, path: location.pathname }; }
